Get in touch

Thanks for considering 3dkaarkhana for your 3D printing and prototyping needs. We’re here to respond quickly and help bring your concept to life.

  • Email: 3dstuff.contact@gmail.com
  • Location: Remote / Service available worldwide

Request a Quote

Please include:

  • project name
  • part quantity
  • preferred materials/technology
  • target timeline
  • file formats (.STL, .OBJ, .STEP, .IGES)

We’ll reply within 24 hours with a quote and recommended workflow.
